summary: Tested 3 new enhancements: (1) PDF upload without fillable fields, (2) Full Preview modal in SpreadBlockEditor, (3) Field Definitions panel (Fields tab) in SpreadBlockEditor right panel. All 15 feature tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: gift_message field was added as test data during testing and persisted to backend - consider cleanup (4 fields now instead of 3 on baby-boy-story template). Test cleanup was done via API in backend tests but the playwright tests added another field.
seed_data_creation: A test field 'gift_message' was added to baby-boy-story template during frontend testing and saved. This is now persisted (4 fields total).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 enhancements fully verified: (1) UploadModal (not browser prompt) with Title/ProductSlug/Description fields + info badge 'Works with any PDF', (2) SpreadBlockEditor right panel has Block and Fields tabs, Fields tab shows field definitions and has Add New Field button, (3) Full Preview modal with Refresh/Download/X buttons and footer note about sample values. Quick Define flow works: unknown token shows red badge + Define button, clicking switches to Fields tab with key pre-filled. Valid tokens show green badge. Save Page works with toast confirmation. Note: baby-boy-story template now has 4 field definitions (3 original + gift_message added during test).
test_features_verified: PASS: Template list loads both templates (My Baby Boy Story + Plain PDF Test)
PASS: Upload button opens UploadModal (not browser prompt) with Title, ProductSlug, Description fields
PASS: UploadModal has info badge 'Works with any PDF - with or without fillable fields'
PASS: Plain PDF template has 0 fillable fields (backend confirmed)
PASS: SpreadBlockEditor right panel has TWO tabs: Block and Fields
PASS: Fields tab shows 3 existing field definitions (dad_name, son_name, message)
PASS: Fields tab has Add New Field button at bottom
PASS: Adding new field (gift_message) via Fields tab saves to backend
PASS: Unknown token [unknown_key] shows red badge + Define button
PASS: Clicking Define button switches to Fields tab with key pre-filled
PASS: Valid token [dad_name] shows green badge
PASS: Full Preview button generates preview modal
PASS: Preview modal has Refresh, Download buttons and X close button
PASS: Preview modal shows footer note about sample values
PASS: Save Page button works and shows success toast
